resources.string: Say temperatura %1$.1f°%2$s et inmepas ed limitasyon mo ya %3$.1f°%2$s
Pagsasali ya man-download data. text ed server yo
Pasakbay: Say pangipaalagey ed opsyon ed tagey so nayarin mamakapuy ed baterya mo nen say dati
Kalsaso ed Likod na Paraan Liket
Say kustombren URL et aliwan aka-set, odino blangko. Sarag mo so onloob ed saray pasen pian makadagdag na kustombre ya URL
Buraen so Amin a Data tan Baley
Agawa so sakey a lingo legan a sasalien dan i-update so pangusar
Ag-agawa so %1$s ya data ed %2$s ya data
Ag naproseso so weather data manlapud server yo, lalo la ed %1$s data
Saray Kolor ed Dalan na Liket ed Dalan
Onloob ed URL ed saray pasen mo.txt
Say tipo ya klase na \'%1$s\' so ag-akapan-importante, nengnengen so pangi-file mo na saray pasen tan salien mo lamet
Ipasakbay so URL ya ag-aka-set, saray pasen ed panag-edit.text pian manguman
Ayusen ko Iya tan Suboken ko Lamet
Sayan app so na-update balet say server ya ikokonekta yo ed ag to ni in-upda so Inigo Plung parad si WeeWX. Nayarin ag-onpanengneng a maong iray uma anggad na-update so panaon na panag-ube
Say ontatken a pankakasakey so ag-onkana, saray akaparaan lan pasen insan ipawil lamet

Say %1$s et mankaukolan natan na %2$s data file manlapud %3$s server, kaukolan mon i-update so %4$s tan i-update so %5$s file antis ya onkiwas a maong iyan app. Pindoten so Ok parad kaaruman iran detalye nipaakar ed %6$s
Say Estadistis na Kaunoran ya Bulan
Mantutumbokan ya set, maples ya panrepresso ya ikarga
Say temperatura %1$.1f°%2$s et inmatagey ed limitasyon ya %3$.1f°%2$s
Diad ontumbok iran ebento na bulan?
Wala ray download odino app ya ag-akaseptup
Kaukolan iray notipikasyon pian naalerto ka no say temperatura, uran odino karakel na uran et onsabi ed saray limitasyon mo
Lapud amidua mon inawat so permiso ed pakaamta, kaukolan mon i-enable itan ed settings imbes, launch settings?
Paki alagar mi legan min papaneknekan so URL ya insumite yo

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye
Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye
Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye
Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye
Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye
Walay %1$d ya error ya anengneng ed %2$s file, nengnengen so %2$s file ya anengneng ed %3$s odino nengnengen so %4$s logs parad saray detalye

resources.string: Say maples ya imahen so man-download
Say ted klase na klase \'%1$s\'s so ag-akadepende, nengnengen so file na saray pasen mo tan salien mo lamet
Bida ya URL ag-aka-set. Sarag moy onlad saray set ya manguman
Inagew-agew ya manalerto no say uran et onsabi ed limitasyon mo
Say uran %1$.2f%2$s et akaparaan ed limitasyon mo ya %3$.2f%2$s
Say uran %1$.1f%2$s et akaparaan ed limitasyon mo ya %3$.1f%2$s
Say rainrate ya %1$.2fin ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Severe\' level
Say rainrate ya %1$.2fin ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Warning\' level
Say rainrate ya %1$.2fin ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Watch\' level
Say rainrate ya %1$.1fmm ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Severe\' level
Say rainrate ya %1$.1fmm ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Warning\' level
Say rainrate ya %1$.1fmm ed apalabas ya %2$d %3$s et akasabi ed \'Watch\' level
Saray alerto no say uran et onlampas ed graben limitasyon base ed karukey na uran
Saray alerto no say uran et onlampas ed limitasyon na pasakbay base ed karukey na uran
Saray alerto no say uran et onlampas ed limitasyon na bantayan base ed karukey na uran
Segurado ka kasin labay mon ekalen so amin ya data?
I-save iray troso na debug na app
Siansia nin i-download so data ya ipasakbay
Manpapaamta na anggad mamidua ed sanagew no say temperatura et onsabi ed limitasyon mo
I-set so manuman upda, balet wala ni so aka-cacer ya
Say URL so niletneg ed ag-inkayadyari odino anggapoy karga to
Usaren so eksakton oras na update
Ag la makakonekta odino aka-download ed apasalan ya URL
Ag to sarag ya ikonekta odino i-download so ipapasakbay
Ag nakonekta o na-download so %1$s manlapud %2$s
Ag la makakonekta odino makakonekta na download ) ya imahen manlapud internet
Ag to sarag ya ikonekta odino i-download iray set server ed server yo
Ag to sarag ya ikonekta odino i-download so imahen na webmam ya imahin
Ag na-download so %1$s ta anggapoy URL to
Say imahen na websim so siansia nin man-uulat
Say Webcam URL et ag-aka-set odino blangko
Na-update lang pero ang koneksyon na WiFi wala
